reasoning: SAF regained control of Khartoum in early 2025 and recent reporting in early 2026 strongly confirms that the SAF continues to control the capital. The fighting has mainly shifted to the western and southern regions like Kordofan and Darfur, where the SAF is currently conducting counter-offensives against the RSF. With the federal government returning to Khartoum and only two days remaining until the resolution date, it is virtually impossible for the RSF to launch an assault and completely retake the well-defended capital by March 31, 2026.
